items.example: Scientists work hard to cure illnesses like cancer.
The doctor performed surgery to save a life.
Marie Curie made a discovery that changed science.
The team conducted research on climate change.
We performed an experiment to test the hypothesis.
Einstein developed a theory about relativity.
We need to find a solution to this problem.
His experiment proved a point about gravity.
The athlete broke a record at the Olympics.
She took a risk and started her own business.
